item.name: Sanbaso
item.description:
Said to be an omen of ample harvests, this wavekin is named for a traditional dance passed down in the Far East.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: This knifejaw's stripes create a striking resemblance to the patterned hat donned during the ceremonial sanbaso dance. Much like these performances, the fish are believed to herald peace between nations and bountiful harvests in days to come.
